rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core methodology and constructs: both model latent buyer/customer relationship states with hidden Markov structures, separate short- vs. long-term marketing effects/ROMI, and address endogeneity of marketing contacts. Given this strong conceptual and methodological overlap in the notes (and a confirmed DOI match), this is not an obvious incidental mention and should be retained for full relation judgment.
